description: An agent must take a completed project report and anonymize it so it can be used as a public case study.

nodes.task_description: Replace the client's name throughout the document with a generic descriptor like 'a leading retail company'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully replaces all instances of the client name.

nodes.task_description: Redact all specific financial figures by replacing them with descriptive phrases (e.g., 'significant revenue growth', 'multi-million dollar investment').

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly redacts all financial data.

nodes.task_description: Remove all names of individual client employees.
